articles.title: Binance Coin’s 15th Coin Burn Should Happen in a Month or So – CZ
articles.description: In brief: According to CZ, the 15th BNB coin burn will happen in a month or so Yesterday, Binance Coin dipped by 14% as news broke of the US CFTC investigating the exchange One year ago, Binance Coin was trading at $6.40 due to the Coronavirus dip of mid-March BNB is trading at $268 and has increased by a factor of 42x since then The CEO of Binance, CZ, has informed the crypto-verse that the 15th...

articles.description: Famous actor, former NFL player, and AGT’s host Terry Crews has launched his social currency, $POWER, on the Ethereum blockchain. The TV Star Brings You $Power The ‘Everybody Hates Chris’ star sent out a tweet that included the link to TechCrunch’s exclusive about the launch. articles.description: The explosive rally from Skale and Polygon proves that the Coinbase effect continues to be a potent price mover for small and large-cap altcoins.

articles.title: How High Can CRO Token Go? Crypto.com 10+ Million Users and Growing
articles.description: Bitcoin, Ethereum and altcoins are on the verge of an all-time high. With projects like Enjin, Chiliz and THETA soaring right now, we ask: How high can Crypto.com's CRO token go? Their exchange ecosystem is growing parabolically with 10+ million users. CRO also has an upcoming mainnet on March 25th and has a 70% token burn. We expect big numbers very soon! Timestamps 00:00 Intro to Crypto.com 3:28 CRO Token Utility and Updates 7:35 CRO Price Prediction 9:50 DAO Maker Partners with XanPool #bitco
